name: Moon
text: It's been months since I've seen her...

name: Moon
text: I asked her, for the sake of both of us, to live on...

name: Moon
text: I knew that our chase could never end.

name: Moon
text: The sunrise would never stop chasing me, even after our sins outgrew our home.
She had lost the world and the sunrise she loved.
She was once told that she could help bring salvation to the world,
but all she could bring was the cold of the night...

name: Selkie
text: No matter how irredeemable you think you are, Moon, I'll find you again!

name: Moon
text: If you keep chasing after me, you'll never escape!
Selkie had gotten lost in the vines created by Moon's sin.
The sunrise must chase her sunset, wrapping them both in an endless cycle...
Tonight, as every night, the chase begins again...
